title: The conditional query of the information_schema meta data table is case-sensitive
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
use test;
create table test (a int primary key);
insert into test values(1);
analyze table test;
select table_name from information_schema.statistics where table_schema='test' and COLUMN_NAME='A';

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
+------------+
| table_name |
+------------+
| test       |
+------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

Empty set (0.00 sec)

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

+-------------------------------------+
| version()                           |
+-------------------------------------+
| 5.7.25-TiDB-v6.5.5-20240316-8ea3cb6 |
+-------------------------------------+
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10,2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_case (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.50);
INSERT INTO test_case (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'Example', NULL);
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='test_case' AND UPPER(column_name)='NAME';
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='test_case' AND column_name='value';
key_bug_features: information_schema query is case-sensitive for column names
